title: Oh Dad, Poor Dad, Mamma's Hung You in the Closet and I'm Feelin' So Sad
writer: Arthur Kopit, Ian Bernard, Herbert Baker
actors: Rosalind Russell, Robert Morse, Barbara Harris
plot: Domineering Madame Rosepettle and her sheltered wimpy man-child son Jonathan fly face first into love, murder, and the meaning of family during this black comedy based on Arthur Kopit's Broadway play.
